case_title: MARIA YOUNG (GUARDIAN) et al VS. BRYAN SILLOREQUEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-03-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. MARIA YOUNG (MOTHER) APPEARS ON BEHALF OF HER SON (GUARDIAN) LUKE YOUNG. DEFENDANT PRESENT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, MARIA     (GUARDIAN) YOUNG, LUKE OLIVER    (MINOR) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILLOREQUEZ, BRYAN $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $790.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
